steps.title: Spot the defining claim
steps.content: The stem states that Vanya's opinion has changed significantly — this requires evidence of what he believed before and what he believes now.

steps.title: Identify the shift in perspective
steps.content:
Choice D is the only quotation that shows both his past view and present view. Vanya says he was proud of the Professor and his learning, but now sees him as “a blank” — declaring “I have been deceived.”

The other choices show only his current frustration or the Professor's perspective, without the before-and-after contrast needed to demonstrate a changed opinion.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
